title: Staurochilus dawsonianus
taxonomy: Staurochilus dawsonianus is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Staurochilus. This genus is a part of the subtribe Gastrochilidinae. The subtribe Gastrochilidinae is a group of orchids commonly found in Asia. The classification of Staurochilus dawsonianus is still being studied and refined by botanists and researchers.
